title: mussel-burrow-cv: a computer vision framework for quantifying freshwater mussel burrowing under hydraulic flume conditions from side-view image sequences
description: MATLAB source code, validation tables, and annotation guide accompanying the manuscript 'A computer vision framework for quantifying freshwater mussel burrowing under hydraulic flume conditions from side-view image sequences' submitted to Ecological Informatics. Includes the frame-wise shell-top tracker with jump and plateau guards, the multiscale quality-aware burrowing/resurfacing detector, and the frozen auto-tracker CSV for the Dataset 2 adjudicated validation subset used to produce the reported trajectory-level, event-level, and trial-level metrics.
